section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports tenderness over the kidney.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is explicitly framed as a patient-reported symptom rather than an examiner-observed physical finding.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient reports inflammation over the kidney.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This is described as a patient report; unless documented as an observed exam finding, it belongs in the subjective history.

section_miscategorizations.text: The patient's father had kidney stones.
section_miscategorizations.reason: Family history is typically part of the subjective history rather than the assessment, though its presence in A is not highly misleading.
